flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of North Texas at Dallas fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (3.3k → 2.9k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of North Texas at Dallas rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 (24.3% → 30.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at University of North Texas at Dallas rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (36.9% → 41.6%).
